name: Track mentions of brand mentions with HTTP / REST API and Twilio at scale

parameters.errorMessage: Missing required field 'content' on incoming post.

categories.description: Posts that are mention for the listening team.
Posts that are question for the listening team.

parameters.message: =✅ Track mentions of brand mentions with HTTP / REST API and Twilio at sc — run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 4 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Required Fields Present?

### Required Fields Present?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.content }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Classify with AI · ②→ Abort — Malformed Input

### Abort — Malformed Input

Fails fast with a clear message; triggers the error workflow instead of processing bad data.

### Classify with AI

LLM classification into: Mention, Question, Complaint (+fallback). Output port order matches this list.

Ports: ①→ Store as Mention · ②→ Store as Question, Capture Failure Context · ③→ Store as Complaint · ④→ Alert Slack — Other

⚠ failures exit via the error rail

### OpenRouter Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Classify with AI** as `languageModel`

🔑 OpenRouter API key

### Store as Mention

Appends a new row to 'Post Tracker' — a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: ①→ Reunite Branches · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Store as Question

Appends a new row to 'Post Tracker' — a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: ①→ Reunite Branches · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Store as Complaint

Appends a new row to 'Post Tracker' — a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: ①→ Reunite Branches · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Alert Slack — Other

Posts a message to Slack (`#social`) — a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

Ports: ①→ Reunite Branches · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

### Reunite Branches

Rejoins 4 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Tag Pipeline Metadata

### Tag Pipeline Metadata

Shapes the item: writes `pipeline`, `version`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Align Field Names

### Align Field Names

Normalizes field names so every source feeds the same downstream schema.

Next: Stamp Processing Time

### Stamp Processing Time

Stamps `processedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Save Execution Metadata

### Save Execution Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record — searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

Appends a new row to 'Post Tracker' — a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: ①→ Send Summary to Twilio · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Twilio

Sends an SMS via Twilio — reserved for urgent alerts since SMS costs money per message, unlike chat notifications.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Twilio SID + token

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Twilio

### Escalate Failure to Twilio

Sends an SMS via Twilio — reserved for urgent alerts since SMS costs money per message, unlike chat notifications.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Twilio SID + token

# Track mentions of brand mentions with HTTP / REST API and Twilio at scale

**Pattern:** Social Listening · **Level:** Advanced · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Track mentions of brand mentions with HTTP / REST API and Twilio at scale. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual listening is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Required Fields Present? → Classify with AI → Store as Mention → Reunite Branches → Tag Pipeline Metadata → Align Field Names → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to social listening without manual effort
- Anyone automating listening in marketing
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Saves hours of manual work each week
- Standardizes the process every time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2 / service account; OpenRouter API key; Slack OAuth2; Twilio SID + token.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger — hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click → Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

One Text Classifier node replaces what would otherwise be a chain of brittle IF/Switch keyword checks — the LLM handles the ambiguous cases a rules engine can't. Each category gets its own action node, so a failure in one branch (say, a bad Slack call) never blocks the others; Merge reunites them so the run still reports one clean completion.

## Practice exercises

You've got the basics covered — push further:

1. Add a 4th category with its own action branch.
2. Replace one action (e.g. a Slack ping) with a task-creation node and see how the wiring changes.
3. Feed the classifier deliberately ambiguous text and check which fallback category it lands in.

## 🛟 Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3× with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail → context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your listening process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.

json.content: Behind the scenes: how we build workflow templates
